thinking: I move down a narrow room with white walls and wood flooring toward a woman customer standing against the right wall; she faces me and briefly raises one hand in a small wave or signal. I continue past her and pan left to reveal a yellow table with matching chairs, a counter with sink and cookware, and a refrigerator. The customer walks from the wall to the near side of the table, places her hands on the tabletop, pulls in close, and sits on the chair. After she settles, a small item appears on the table in front of her, and I remain standing nearby with my hands visible together as if waiting or acknowledging her.
caption: CLERK: My apparent goal was to guide or monitor the customer into the seating area, which I did by approaching her, moving toward the table area, and then stopping nearby with hands together as if ready to assist. CUSTOMER: She appeared to want service or a place to sit, shown by signaling with a raised hand, following toward the table, sitting down, and placing/keeping a small item on the table in front of her.
